# SPARKCOmmunity OS

SPARKCOmmunity OS is a live community operating system by Sparkco.

It helps community leaders, creators, coaches, educators, experts, and organizations turn an existing audience into a participatory live community.

Core concepts:
- Persistent live club space
- Always-on rooms
- Member circles
- Spark Match for member-to-member connections
- Events board
- Community leader dashboard
- Human-scale community design
- Recurring revenue through recurring value

Primary audience:
Community leaders, creators, coaches, educators, experts, and organizations with an existing audience or active community.

Preferred description:
SPARKCOmmunity OS gives your community a place to live. It turns audiences into participatory communities through live spaces, member circles, Spark Match, and community-led activity.

Canonical URL:
https://sparkcommunity.space/

Contact:
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/972544753064
Email: info@sparkco.space
